projectDescription: Real-time monitoring and visualization dashboard for Firedancer and Frankendancer Solana validators
keyFeatures: Live network metrics and tile performance visualization
Gossip network peer tracking and visualization
Leader schedule display with slot rankings
Detailed slot performance analysis and transaction tracking
Startup progress monitoring with visual indicators
Support for both Firedancer and Frankendancer clients
publicApiSurface: useSlotInfo - Hook for slot data retrieval
useSlotRankings - Hook for slot performance rankings
useLeaderSchedule - Hook for leader schedule data
StatusIcon - Component for validator status display
SlotTimeline - Component for slot timeline visualization
LiveNetworkMetrics - Component for network metrics display
LiveTileMetrics - Component for tile performance metrics
GossipView - Component for gossip network visualization
